surgicalKitsHeroTitle:
Implant placement control
at every stage
surgicalKitsHeroLead:
Instrument kits that help position implants accurately,
simplify the clinician's work, and reduce the risk of errors.
surgicalKitsHeroBullet1: Control over implant direction and position
surgicalKitsAdvantagesLead: The system makes implantation more controlled and predictable
surgicalKitsFeatureCard1Text: The instruments help define the precise placement direction
surgicalKitsFeatureCard2Text: Each stage is structured and performed in sequence
surgicalKitsFeatureCard3Text: Minimizes deviations and improves result accuracy
surgicalKitsDetailLead:
The kits structure the implant placement process.
Each stage is completed consistently and predictably.
The clinician works faster and with a lower risk of errors.
surgicalKitsCompositionLead: The Surgical Kits line includes dedicated kits for specific clinical tasks: parallelism, pre-drilling, and the prosthetic stage.
surgicalKitsStep1Text: Access and the starting point are created
surgicalKitsStep2Text: The instruments define the precise axis
surgicalKitsStep3Text: The implant is placed according to the position
surgicalKitsVideoLead: How the system helps control the implant placement process
surgicalKitsFinalCtaTitle: Ready to improve implant placement accuracy?
surgicalKitsFinalCtaText: We will match a Surgical Kit to your protocol and clinical tasks.
